trim_reasons: min_floor=21.9 is below the 24-minute threshold, meaning a single low-usage or foul-trouble game produces a miss even at T10. Fox's moderate volatility combined with a fragile minutes floor means the pick is contingent on playing time, not a guaranteed floor.

VOLATILE tag on a player whose FG_MARGIN was thin enough to mandate a step-down means a cold shooting night can easily close the gap from 15 to the line — post_miss bounce-back lift is only 0.81, the weakest on the slate, indicating the floor doesn't reliably snap back after a miss.

vs_tough=59% and competitive=67% both sit materially below Jokic's overall REB rate, and SA's defense has been trending tighter over the L5 (delta_pct=-5.9%). REB is confirmed slump-persistent per audit history — if Jokic had a sub-par board game recently, the combined tough-matchup and split suppression creates a structurally softer floor than iron_floor status would imply (notably, iron_floor=False here).

VOLATILE tag combined with opp_defense=tough and a typical_miss of 7 pts below threshold means a bad shooting night easily undershoots T15 — the distribution is wide enough that the structural floor is genuinely fragile, and the FG_MARGIN_NEG penalty already forced a step-down indicating thin scoring margin above the line.

VOLATILE tag, min_floor=22.9 (<24), FG_MARGIN_NEG forcing a mandatory step-down, and a typical_miss of 5 pts below threshold together create a genuinely fragile floor — a single low-minutes or cold-shooting game against a DEN defense collapses the pick, and none of these risks are offset by iron_floor status or a favorable split.

B2B with insufficient B2B hit rate data (no reliable floor), VOLATILE tag, QUES status, min_floor=23.4 (<24), post_miss bounce-back lift of only 0.71 (worst on slate), and competitive split=52% all converge on the same player for the same prop — the structural risks are stacked and the b2b_hit_rate is unknowable, making the confidence floor entirely unverifiable.

B2B rest with no reliable B2B hit rate data means the 90% overall hit rate cannot be stress-tested against fatigue conditions; min_floor=23.4 means a short-minutes B2B game — entirely plausible given QUES status — reduces attempts and makes even a T1 3PM miss structurally possible.
